source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A unit circle has its center at $(5,0)$ and a second circle with a radius of $2$ units has its center at $(11,0)$ as shown. A common internal tangent to the circles intersects the $x$-axis at $Q(a,0)$. What is the value of $a$? <image1>
